falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant blowoff score would indicate a market climax, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a reversal rather than continuation of the current pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 2022 May Luna bottom level (specific price threshold) within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking above this key support level would contradict the pattern's implied bearish structure, proving the current verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: A major central bank intervention (e.g., emergency rate cut or quantitative easing announcement) occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an event would introduce exogenous market distortion, invalidating the pattern-based analysis and rendering the 'HOLD' signal obsolete.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
